title: Phase 3: Real waveform peaks in asset browser
description: After job-complete event, call get_waveform_peaks for the new audio file and store in jobStore alongside output_path. AssetBrowser shows real peaks via WaveformCanvas instead of Wave sin-bars.

title: Show AudioSR server in topbar health tracker
description: The topbar health tracker shows TTS, SFX, and Music but omits the Post/AudioSR server even though modelStore polls it. Add AudioSR to the indicator list.
close_reason: Added AudioSR/Post to the topbar health tracker and documented the server-health contract.

title: Add Settings buttons for inference server setup
description: Settings currently has one-click Woosh checkpoint setup, but TTS, Music, AudioLDM, and AudioSR server dependency installs remain copy-paste commands. Add GUI buttons that run the existing inference/setup.sh flows and stream progress/status back to the Settings page.
close_reason: Added Settings buttons that run inference/setup.sh profiles for core TTS/Music deps, AudioLDM deps, and AudioSR deps with live setup logs; retained copyable commands.

title: One-shot inference setup script using uv venvs
description: Replace the conda-based first-time setup with an idempotent inference/setup.sh that uses uv to create local venvs (.venv-tts, .venv-music) with pinned requirements files. start_servers.sh defaults to these local venvs but stays overridable via env vars for users who want conda. SFX continues to use the Woosh uv venv it already has.

title: Drop misleading '~2s' ETA on character designer takes
description: In CharacterDesignerView pushJob, eta is hardcoded to ~2s but generation can take much longer. Replace with '…' to match the rest of the codebase.

title: Add takes list to TTS production panel
description: Voice/Dialogue panel currently has no way to see, play, or QA generated takes. Replace the static 'Voice model' sidebar text with a vertical list of recent takes for the active scene. Reuse TakeRow/TakeList from the character designer.

title: Reduce script-row write debounce from 5s to 500ms; flush on blur/unmount
description: CompositionView.tsx:147 waits 5s before persisting CSV edits. Risk of lost work on crash. Drop to 500ms and flush on blur/view-switch/unmount.

title: Phase 1: TypeScript data model + Zustand stores
description: Types for Project, Scene, ScriptRow, Asset, Job, SidecarMeta. Zustand stores: projectStore, jobStore, playbackStore, modelStore. Seeded with mockup data.

title: Add manual AudioLDM checkpoint download command
description: Native AudioLDM first-run urllib downloads can fail near completion. Add Settings guidance for a resumable manual checkpoint download into ~/.cache/audioldm, while keeping HF command labeled as diffusers fallback.
close_reason: Added resumable native AudioLDM checkpoint download command to Settings and documented HF fallback distinction.

title: Take families UI: right-click clip → list takes, swap, QA
description: Sidecar already has parent/take_index/qa_status. Add a take-management surface: right-click a placed clip in the timeline shows all takes for its row, lets you swap which take is active, mark approved/rejected, and listen side-by-side.

title: Flush Clip Studio envelope joins
description: Align the fade curves and sustain segment so the envelope joins do not show a visible offset.
close_reason: Centered sustain line on curve endpoint and overlapped joins by 2px

title: Wire Render Scene button with progress modal
description: The 'Render scene' button in CompositionView header calls renderScene() from tauriCommands. Show an inline render-state indicator (rendering/done/error) in the header. On completion, show the output path and a PlayButton to preview the render.wav in Web Audio.

title: Empty states everywhere: characters / takes / scenes / assets / scripts
description: EmptyTakes exists but most surfaces just show blank space when data is missing. Add a consistent empty-state pattern (illustration + one-line + primary CTA) for every list view in the app.

title: Integration smoke test: project create → script import → stub gen → render → assert
description: Zero frontend tests; two Rust unit tests. At minimum: one end-to-end Rust test that creates a project, imports a small Fountain, generates one stub TTS take via the inference HTTP path, calls render_scene, asserts render.wav + meta exist with expected fields. One per core path catches huge regression class.

title: Phase 2: Frontend modelStore + server health
description: src/store/modelStore.ts: server health state (tts/sfx/music status). Listen for Tauri job-progress/complete/failed events in jobStore. Transport bar shows server status dots. Poll health on mount.

title: Keyboard shortcuts: Cmd-Enter to send, Cmd-Z editor, J/K/L scrub, arrows for scenes
description: Space is the only wired shortcut. Add: Cmd/Ctrl-Enter to submit generation, Cmd-Z/Y for editor undo, J/K/L for transport scrub, ←/→ for scene navigation, Cmd-S explicit save (flush all pending writes).

title: Pre-mount Scenes sub-tabs to eliminate tab-switch lag
description: Switching Compose/Voice/Sound/Score remounts each panel and re-fetches all assets via Tauri (often 20+ IPC calls). Keep all four mounted within the Scenes workspace and toggle via display:none.

title: Make Clip Studio envelope curves unmistakable
description: The compact Clip Studio waveform still showed fade handles, but the envelope curve line was not visibly distinguishable over dense waveform bars.
close_reason: Rendered envelope as layered halo, foreground, and accent strokes above waveform bars

title: Phase 4: QA approve/reject workflow
description: Add approve/reject buttons to asset rows in the browser. Calls update_sidecar_qa with qa_status='approved'/'rejected'. Show qa_status badge color (green/red/gray). Filter button to show only unreviewed takes.

title: Compact Clip Studio bottom editor
description: Reduce the full-width Clip Studio bottom dock height after the enlarged editor proved too tall.
close_reason: Reduced bottom dock height and waveform viewport while preserving full-width editing

title: Replace invisible Clip Studio envelope path
description: SVG envelope path still failed to show in the compact dock; replace it with visible DOM-rendered curve markers.
close_reason: Replaced SVG path with DOM-rendered sustain line and sampled fade curve points

title: Wire reverb_send: ship a small/medium IR, route via afir per-clip in render_scene
description: reverb_send is a column in script.csv that does nothing. Either wire it (ship room/hall IR files with the binary, route reverb-tap per clip via ffmpeg afir into a wet bus) or remove the field. Wiring is the better choice — it's the cheapest space cue.

title: Support long reference imports and zoomed clip extraction
description: Clip Studio should import long recordings into project assets, provide zoom/pan waveform selection for extracting short voice sections, and make saved reference clips selectable in Character Designer for voice cloning.
close_reason: Added long audio import, zoom/pan crop selection, streamed long-file peaks/playback, and Character Designer clone-reference selection from saved clips.

title: Phase 2: Python inference stub servers
description: Three FastAPI servers in inference/: tts_server.py (port 18001), sfx_server.py (18002), music_server.py (18003). Stub endpoints that return fake audio (tiny WAV), proper /health, /generate/*, /jobs/{id} structure. In-memory job store with simulated async progress. requirements.txt pinned.

title: Tune Clip Studio envelope line styling
description: Reduce envelope thickness and remove the white foreground sustain line from the compact Clip Studio editor.
close_reason: Removed white foreground layer and reduced envelope band thickness

title: Project launcher view
Track-type bus structure with HPF on dialogue bus
description: Submix dialogue / music+bed / sfx separately with sane default trims. HPF at 80Hz on dialogue bus to kill TTS rumble. Reuses the dialogue/duck-target/passthrough categorization already in render_scene.

title: Fix duration parser NaN propagation in PyramidView
description: PyramidView.tsx:60 split(':').map(Number) returns NaN for malformed duration strings, silently corrupting episodeTotalSec.

title: Python inference server stubs (TTS / SFX / Music)
Build Fountain-based prose script editor with per-block Generate
description: Two-pane editor: Fountain source on left, parsed blocks with status+Generate buttons on right. Compile Fountain to script.csv with stable IDs so timeline placements survive prose edits. Preserves and enhances the per-line/per-character generation flow.

title: Phase 2: Rust sidecar + audio commands
description: commands/sidecar.rs: write_sidecar, read_sidecar, get_takes (atomic write, adjacent to WAV). commands/audio.rs: get_waveform_peaks (read WAV, compute peaks array), get_duration_ms. Wire into lib.rs.

title: Report native AudioLDM download progress accurately
description: Native AudioLDM checkpoint downloads write progress bars to stderr, but Pharaoh uses a blind timer capped at 92%, making first-run downloads look like stuck inference. Parse upstream progress lines and expose real download/sampling/save progress.
close_reason: Parsed native AudioLDM download, DDIM, and save progress instead of using a blind heartbeat.

title: Add Clip Studio post-production page
description: Add a separate Post Clip Studio page for sidecar-indexed generated audio. It should support trimming, practical ffmpeg effects, child asset sidecars, and optional assignment to a scene script row while keeping Audio Upscale as its own page.
close_reason: Implemented Clip Studio page, ffmpeg child-asset processing, navigation wiring, script-row assignment, docs, and verification.

title: Move native AudioLDM checkpoint default under pharaoh-models
description: Native AudioLDM defaults to upstream ~/.cache/audioldm, but Pharaoh should keep model weights under ~/pharaoh-models. Set AUDIOLDM_CACHE_DIR/PHARAOH_AUDIOLDM_CACHE_DIR consistently in startup, server, setup, settings, and docs.
close_reason: Defaulted native AudioLDM cache to ~/pharaoh-models/sfx/audioldm and exported AUDIOLDM_CACHE_DIR for upstream CLI compatibility.

title: Persist Fountain text to disk: write script.fountain alongside script.csv
description: Editor compiles to script.csv but the prose itself only lives in component state. Closing mid-edit loses handwritten formatting. Write script.fountain in the scene dir; load and prefer it over rowsToBlocks reconstruction.

title: Fix Post server Python 3.9 import crash
description: AudioSR Post server runs inside .venv-audiosr on Python 3.9, but shared inference helper and post_server used Python 3.10-only type syntax.
close_reason: Replaced Python 3.10-only unions and added Pydantic v1/v2 dump compatibility for the Python 3.9 AudioSR environment.

title: Phase 1: Port design system from mockup
description: Port styles.css, Wave/Icon/StatusRing atoms to TypeScript. Preserve OKLCH color system, JetBrains Mono + Inter Tight, forest/warm/neutral theme vars.

title: Replace diffusers AudioLDM path with native AudioLDM runner
description: AudioLDM via current diffusers stack generates unusable static-like output in the Woosh env. Replace the default backend with the upstream AudioLDM CLI/native package path, keep diffusers only as explicit debug fallback, and fail clearly when native AudioLDM is not installed.
close_reason: Moved AudioLDM production path to isolated upstream native runner; left diffusers as explicit debug fallback due bad model behavior in Woosh stack.

title: Phase 1: csvParser.ts
description: Full read/write/update for script.csv. Support unresolved→resolved transition (file + start_ms + duration_ms population). Typed ScriptRow interface.

title: Phase 2: Wire generation panels to Tauri
description: Wire TTS/SFX/Music panel Generate buttons to submit_*_job commands. Job appears in JobQueue with live progress. On complete: write sidecar, update matching CSV rows, refresh asset browser.

title: Phase 4: Web Audio preview player
description: Add a lightweight Web Audio API player to the asset browser and timeline. Clicking any asset row or timeline clip should play back the audio. Controls: play/pause, position display. No full transport needed — just in-context previewing.

title: Refresh README for current Pharaoh workflows
description: Update README to cover the current GUI, inference, post-production, AudioLDM/AudioSR, Fountain, and headless CLI workflows.
close_reason: README updated for current GUI, inference, post, and CLI workflows

title: First-run / sample-project flow with --example flag and built-in demo project
description: Cold open with no Python servers + no project = empty launcher + dead generators. Ship a built-in sample project with mock-mode scripts that walks the user through pyramid → write → generate → render. Add --example CLI flag that creates a fresh demo project on disk.

title: Phase 1: Port all React view components
description: PyramidView, CompositionView/Timeline, TTSPanel/SFXPanel/MusicPanel, StoryBibleView, AgentFeed, AssetBrowser, JobQueue, PlaybackBar. Convert from JSX to TSX.

title: Group Voice/SFX/Score rail items into single Generate panel
description: Rail is at 11 items + folder/settings. Voice/SFX/Score share 80% of UX surface. Collapse to one 'Generate' rail item that opens a tabbed panel.
close_reason: Resolved by Pharaoh-wzn (workspace refactor): Voice/SFX/Score collapsed into Scenes workspace as inline sub-tabs

title: Persistent AppConfig (Rust)
close_reason: AppConfig persistence implemented: Rust struct, load-on-startup in lib.rs, get/save commands in settings.rs, TypeScript types and commands wired

title: Fill missing CustomVoice checkpoint
description: SoX has been installed and documented in setup. Remaining environment gap: ~/pharaoh-models/tts/custom_voice is empty while base, voice_design, tokenizer, ACE-Step, and Woosh checkpoints are populated. Download/link Qwen3-TTS CustomVoice if preset-speaker generation is needed.

title: UX polish: center new-project form, hf CLI, remove TTS/SFX chips
Character Designer page: voice design + clone workflow
close_reason: Character Designer page shipped — voice design, clone, and custom voice tabs working

title: Fix TTS tokenizer file resolution for voice_design
description: voice_design fails to load when merges.txt or tokenizer.json is missing from its dir. The shared TOKENIZER_DIR only holds the speech codec; the symlink loop in tts_server.py only covers tokenizer.json + special_tokens_map.json. Extend resolution to cover the full text-tokenizer set and add a sibling-variant fallback so a complete base/ can supply files to voice_design/. Also update the SettingsView download command to pull the full text-tokenizer set into TOKENIZER_DIR.

title: Settings panel + server management UI
Agent assist beyond Draft Scene: review / suggest next line / what's missing
description: Agent assist button shows in CompositionView but only Fountain editor's Draft Scene is wired. Add: 'agent: review my scene' (note holes), 'agent: suggest next line' (per-character continuation), 'agent: what's missing' (continuity check).

title: Scene creation UI in PyramidView
Measure ebur128 on render.wav → render.meta.json → real transport readout
description: Run ebur128 over the rendered WAV, parse integrated/range/peak from stderr. Write to scenes/<slug>/render.meta.json. Frontend reads this on render complete and shows real LUFS/TP/LRA in the transport bar instead of the hardcoded values.

title: Add GitHub Actions compile checks for macOS and Linux
description: Add CI workflow that installs Node/Rust/Tauri system dependencies and verifies Pharaoh compiles on macOS and Linux. Scope is compile/build validation, not signed release artifacts or Windows packaging.
close_reason: Added GitHub Actions workflow for macOS and Ubuntu Tauri no-bundle compile checks, plus frontend and Rust checks.

title: Clarify clone-mode direction: bracket directives only
description: In clone mode, generate_voice_clone has no instruct param - direction must come from inline [bracket] directives in the dialogue text. The current 'Direction · rich text' field gets sent as the spoken text. Update help/placeholder so users know to use [sad], [whisper], etc. inline.

title: Testing prep: README, setup guide, polish
description: Write README.md covering: prerequisites (Rust, Node, Python 3.11+), quick start (npm install, tauri dev), inference server setup (python -m venv, pip install, start_servers.sh), demo mode vs real project mode, known limitations. Also audit error handling, empty states, and obvious crashes.
close_reason: README written, committed, ready for local testing

title: Setup integrity: detect ffmpeg/Python servers at startup; route errors to actionable banners
description: First-run experience hits walls: ffmpeg not in PATH = unreadable stderr blob; Python servers down = generic toasts. Add startup detection + persistent banner with copy-paste install instructions; route inference-server-down errors to a Models-view link.

title: Expand Clip Studio bottom editor
description: Make the Clip Studio bottom clip region larger and span the full available page width.
close_reason: Implemented larger full-width Clip Studio bottom editor

title: Restore compact Clip Studio envelope visibility
description: Compacting the Clip Studio bottom dock made the fade envelope curve too subtle to see.
close_reason: Raised compact dock envelope stroke, fill, z-index, and handle placement

title: Fix Clip Studio subpixel waveform rendering
description: Real waveform peaks load as thousands of SVG rects across a small viewport, causing the preview and thumbnails to vanish until zoomed.
notes: Root cause: loaded 12k peak arrays were rendered directly as SVG bars, making each bar subpixel width at 1x. Fallback showed briefly until real peaks replaced it.
close_reason: Bucketed visible peaks before rendering crop preview and thumbnails; npm build and diff check pass.

title: Fix audio playback: enable assetProtocol so convertFileSrc URLs resolve
description: audioStore rewrite at c3e6f09 switched from Web Audio + readFile (ArrayBuffer) to HTML5 audio + convertFileSrc URLs to support long-file streaming. Tauri 2 requires app.security.assetProtocol.enable + scope for asset.localhost URLs to resolve, and tauri.conf.json never had it. Result: every playback fails to load, store flips playing→null in 1 frame.

title: Phase 2: Project open/create flow
description: ProjectPicker component shown when no project loaded. Lists ~/pharaoh-projects/ via list_projects. New project form calls create_project. On select: load project.json + storyboard.json into projectStore. Replace hardcoded mock seed.
notes: ProjectPicker component complete; real project loading into store is Phase 3 wiring

title: Apply pan + reverb_send columns in render_scene
description: The script.csv data model has pan (-1..1) and reverb_send (0..1) per row. render_scene currently ignores both. Apply pan via equal-power gain in the per-clip filter chain. Defer reverb_send to a follow-up since it needs a reverb implementation choice.

title: Add audio upscale page for generated assets
description: Create a dedicated UI page where users can pick already-generated audio assets and run an upscaling/enhancement pass. Start with app/navigation and command plumbing consistent with Pharaoh's headless architecture.
close_reason: Added project-wide Audio Upscale page, persistent generated asset scanner, optional AudioSR setup, GUI command, and headless CLI upscaling.

title: Fix Clip Studio waveform visibility and scrollbars
description: Clip Studio crop preview renders quiet clips nearly invisible and nested scrollbars look outside pane bounds.
notes: Waveform issue was raw peak display for low-amplitude clips; scrollbar issue was default global scrollbars on nested Clip Studio panes.
close_reason: Added display-only waveform normalization and Clip Studio-specific thin scrollbars; npm build and diff check pass.

title: Tauri bundle pipeline: signed DMG/MSI/AppImage with version metadata
description: Currently nothing ships. tauri build runs locally but no signed release artifact. Set up GitHub Actions or local script that produces signed bundles for macOS arm64 + x64 (codesigned), Windows MSI, Linux AppImage.

title: Integrate AudioLDM for long SFX and soundscapes
description: Evaluate AudioLDM/AudioLDM2 for Pharaoh long ambience needs and add an easy AudioLDM-backed SFX path for >5s effects and >60s soundscapes while keeping Woosh for short high-quality foley.
close_reason: Integrated optional AudioLDM v1 SFX backend for long soundscapes, kept Woosh for short foley, documented AudioLDM2 deferral.

title: Make Space + transport play button toggle audio playback (don't restart)
description: ClipStudio's Space handler always called play() from the start; the transport bar's play/pause was wired to the stub playbackStore not the real audioStore. Result: once you started a long preview, no UI control could stop it.

title: Phase 1: Rust project CRUD commands
description: Tauri commands: create_project, open_project, list_projects, create_scene, update_scene. Directory structure scaffolding. project.json + storyboard.json r/w.

title: Scene plates: pips show real per-channel asset state (hollow=planned, filled=placed)
description: PyramidView renders mock asset nodes under each scene plate. Replace with derived counts from each scene's script.csv: per kind (TTS / SFX / MUSIC; BED counts as SFX), draw hollow ring for rows with no start_ms (planned in script) and filled square for rows with start_ms (placed on timeline). DIRECTION rows excluded.

title: Implement auto-ducking in audio_engine.rs
description: DIALOGUE clips duck BED/MUSIC tracks by configured dB with attack/release curves. Default -8dB duck, 80ms attack, 300ms release. Wire into render_scene filter_complex graph.

title: Add Clip Studio envelope editor
description: Add Ableton-style draggable crop/fade envelope controls and move the Clip Studio waveform editor into a bottom dock above the global transport.
notes: Implemented docked bottom waveform editor with draggable crop bars, fade length diamonds, and curve handles. Extended clip processor payload to pass ffmpeg afade curve names.
close_reason: Bottom dock and curved envelope controls implemented; cargo check, npm build, and diff check pass.

title: Implement P1 architecture fixes for headless operation
description: Fix backend project-root inconsistency, add a usable headless CLI path, and auto-bind completed jobs into script.csv so agent workflows do not require UI clicks.
close_reason: Implemented shared project-root resolution, headless CLI mode, and automatic script binding for completed generations.

title: Cast & Voices completeness: clone reference upload, voice design history, A/B preview
description: Works but sparse. Voice clone reference upload flow + preview, voice-design generation history with peaks, A/B preview between two assigned voices for the same line.

title: Redo SFX generation page controls and take history
description: SFX panel should start with an empty prompt, expose Woosh/AudioLDM parameters, and replace static variation mockups with real generated takes for the selected scene.
close_reason: Reworked SFX panel with empty prompt, backend-specific controls, Woosh CFG parameter support, and real per-scene generated take history.

title: Real timeline tracks from script.csv
description: When realProjectId is set and scriptRows are loaded in CompositionView, derive timeline tracks from script rows instead of mock data. Group by row.track, map placed rows (file+start_ms) to clips. Falls back to mock tracks in demo mode.

title: Audio playback wiring — verify PlayButton + transport
Real data loading — strip mock fallbacks
close_reason: Stripped MOCK_JOBS, MOCK_ASSETS, MOCK_AGENT_LOG, MOCK_SCENE_SCRIPTS fallbacks; stores initialize empty and populate from real Tauri data

title: Route dialogue generation through CustomVoice with editable direction
description: Dialogue generation should expose separate line and direction fields, pass direction as Qwen CustomVoice instruct text, and avoid using the Base/clone model for dialogue rows that need performance direction.
close_reason: Dialogue generation now exposes separate line/direction editors and routes GUI/headless dialogue through CustomVoice instruct.

title: Project chooser: 'Switch project' rail button opens launcher list, not state-wipe
description: Currently the folder icon at the bottom of the rail just clears state — user has to know to come back to the launcher. Should pop a project chooser/launcher overlay so they can pick another project directly.

title: Phase 4: Take selector in asset browser
description: Group completed TTS/SFX/Music jobs by (scene_slug, row_index) in the asset browser. Show take number badges, allow selecting the 'active' take. Selecting a take calls update_script_row to set the file field. Reads takes via get_takes sidecar command.

title: Expose GUI workflows through CLI
description: Add agent-first CLI parity for project/scene/script/character/server/model/asset/direct-generation/post/setup workflows so GUI features are operable headless.
notes: Implemented broad CLI parity for project/scene/script/character/server/model/asset/direct-generation/post/setup workflows.
close_reason: Implemented CLI parity commands, docs, and shared import helper; verified cargo check, npm build, setup status, project list, asset list.

title: Fix AudioLDM backend crash and improve defaults
description: AudioLDM SFX backend crashes on second request because the model-id helper is shadowed by loaded model state. Also tune default AudioLDM prompt/settings because first outputs are low quality compared with upstream examples.
close_reason: Fixed AudioLDM model-id helper shadowing crash and moved defaults closer to upstream quality settings.

title: Agent activity indicator — dynamic 10s pulse on CLI invoke
Script canvas + synopsis editable + char edit affordance
close_reason: Script canvas, editable synopsis, and mock scene scripts all implemented and verified in browser

title: Fix AudioSR upscale page layout and dependency import
description: Audio Upscale page constrains the main panel to a narrow central column, controls overflow, and long errors run off-screen. AudioSR env also fails importing librosa because pkg_resources/setuptools is missing; pin runtime deps for macOS.
close_reason: Expanded Upscale page layout, contained long errors, and fixed AudioSR runtime deps with setuptools plus urllib3 pin.

title: Models Manager view — load/unload/swap per server
Put local inference models in expected Pharaoh locations
description: Resolve local setup failure where start_servers.sh cannot find model-specific virtualenvs and existing downloaded models are scattered outside the expected Pharaoh inference/model paths.
notes: Resolved app-side clone hang/progress issue: added max_new_tokens to clone requests, server-side TTS progress heartbeat during blocking Qwen generation, and Character Designer submitting state before job id returns. Remaining environment notes: sox is not installed; ~/pharaoh-models/tts/custom_voice is empty, while base/voice_design/tokenizer/music/Woosh checkpoints are populated.
close_reason: Confirmed model directories; user ran setup so venvs exist. Fixed Character Designer clone progress/hang path with bounded clone generation, server heartbeat progress, and submitting UI state. Filed environment follow-up for SoX and missing CustomVoice weights.

title: ClipStudio scroll-to-zoom on waveform with cursor-anchored zoom + window peaks
description: Mouse wheel over waveform should zoom in centered on cursor; pull more peaks at higher zoom (or fetch window peaks for the zoomed range so resolution stays sharp). The user opened this earlier; we paused mid-implementation.

title: Add draggable Clip Studio crop handles
description: Clip Studio waveform should support draggable vertical crop handles that update trim start/end, and Space should preview from the left crop handle.
close_reason: Added draggable waveform crop handles and Space-bar region preview from the left handle.

title: Final Assembly: render_episode + FinalAssemblyView
description: Concatenate per-scene render.wav files with crossfades into output/final.wav, apply episode-level master chain, measure ebur128. Frontend view in Polish workspace shows scene strips with measured loudness, drag-reorder, gap/crossfade controls, single Render episode button.

title: TTS panel takes list filters by wrong scene slug
description: TTSPanel takes filter uses local 'scene' state derived from defaultScene prop, but submitTts writes activeSceneSlug from project store. They diverge so takes never match. Filter should use activeSceneSlug, same source-of-truth.

title: Expand headless CLI coverage beyond implemented generation/render path
description: The new CLI now supports project inspection/creation, row generation, and scene rendering. Remaining headless gaps include scene/storyboard authoring, inference server auto-start, and the broader staged pipeline described in ARCHITECTURE.md.
notes: Added CLI parity commands for per-scene Fountain read/write+compile, Anthropic draft-scene with optional persistence, storyboard review alias, audio peaks/duration/zero-crossings, render metadata, and hardware detection. Remaining lifecycle/server-start gap tracked separately.
close_reason: Expanded CLI parity for GUI authoring/review/audio-inspection/render-metadata/setup-hardware flows; remaining inference lifecycle work tracked as Pharaoh-wnf.

title: Project archive / export: bundle a project into a self-contained directory or zip
description: Phase 7 deliverable. CLI: pharaoh project archive <project>. Bundle the project dir + all referenced assets + a manifest into a shareable artifact. UI button somewhere in App workspace or Polish.

title: Restore generation color coding: sub-tab fills, rail badges per channel
description: After the nav refactor, generation surfaces (Voice/SFX/Score) feel hidden. Strengthen the active sub-tab styling and add per-channel color indicators on the Scenes rail icon when generators are active.

title: Move AudioSR behind Post inference server
description: AudioSR was executed by the local Tauri process, violating the local UI / remote ML server contract. Route upscaling through a Post HTTP inference service instead.
close_reason: Moved AudioSR execution behind the Post inference server and routed GUI/CLI upscales through HTTP polling.

title: TTS server: support multiple variants in memory simultaneously
description: Replace single _tts_model with a dict keyed by type. Loading a new variant doesn't unload existing ones. On failure (likely OOM), return a structured error so the FE can show a memory-warning toast directing user to the model manager.

title: Consolidate dual playback stores: useAudioStore is real, usePlaybackStore is stub
description: The transport bar reads both with a fallback. usePlaybackStore is leftover from before useAudioStore existed. Fold any remaining usePlaybackStore call sites into useAudioStore (positionMs, etc.) and delete the stub.

title: Stop generator panels re-listing assets on every job tick
description: TTSPanel/SFXPanel/MusicPanel all useEffect on the entire jobs array as a dep. Every 500ms job-progress update fires listGeneratedAudioAssets + per-asset getWaveformPeaks IPC. Switch to a stable projection (only completed jobs for the current scene).

title: Wire Anthropic LLM for scene drafting from logline + scene heading
description: Read llm_config from project.json, call Anthropic API to draft Fountain text for a scene given the project context (logline, synopsis, characters) and a scene heading/description. Stream into Fountain editor.

title: Music server: rewrite against real ACEStepPipeline API + auto-load
description: music_server.py was written against a fictional API (ACEStepPipeline.from_pretrained + .generate()) that doesn't exist. Real API: from acestep.pipeline_ace_step import ACEStepPipeline; pipe = ACEStepPipeline(checkpoint_dir=...); pipe(prompt=..., lyrics=..., audio_duration=..., save_path=..., task='text2music'). Rewrite to use correct API, add auto-load with MUSIC_OOM marker, fix start_servers.sh setup instructions to install ace-step from git.

title: Phase 3: ffmpeg audio engine scaffold
description: src-tauri/src/audio_engine.rs: normalize_clip (ffmpeg -af loudnorm), resample_to_48k, render_scene (build filter_complex from script.csv, write to render/scene_N.wav). Wrap as Tauri commands render_scene + render_final.

title: SFX server auto-load on generate
description: sfx_server.py fails any /generate/t2a call with 'Model not loaded — call /load first' if no model is loaded yet. Mirror the TTS server's auto-load pattern: call an _ensure_model helper at the top of _run_sfx that loads the Woosh model on first request under a lock.

title: Phase 3: Script CSV panel in Composition view
description: Show script.csv rows in CompositionView as an editable table below the timeline. Each row: type badge, character, prompt, status dot. Inline editing with debounced write to script.csv via Tauri. New rows added from timeline selection.

title: Add visible native AudioLDM progress
description: Native AudioLDM subprocess hides CLI progress until completion, leaving the UI/server looking stuck. Stream stdout/stderr, update job progress while running, and surface setup/download stalls clearly.
close_reason: Native AudioLDM subprocess now streams stdout/stderr and emits heartbeat job progress while running.

title: Render Clip Studio envelope as line
description: Replace dotted Clip Studio fade envelope markers with continuous line rendering.
close_reason: Replaced sampled envelope dots with connected DOM curve bands

title: Avoid AudioLDM CUDA-only candidate ranking on Mac
description: Native AudioLDM crashes after DDIM on M1/CPU because n_candidate_gen_per_text > 1 triggers CLAP ranking that unconditionally calls waveform.cuda(). Detect CUDA and force one candidate on non-CUDA; update setup/docs.
close_reason: Detected native AudioLDM CUDA support and forced one candidate on non-CUDA platforms to avoid upstream waveform.cuda() crash.

title: Phase 1: Scaffold Tauri 2 + React/TypeScript
description: Initialize Tauri 2 app with React 18 + TypeScript. Set up vite, tsconfig, CSS vars, package.json with all deps (zustand, @tauri-apps/api).

title: Prevent AudioLDM prompt filename overflow
description: Native AudioLDM CLI uses prompt text in output filenames, causing macOS/system errors for long Pharaoh structured prompts. Pass a short sanitized prompt to the CLI while retaining metadata.
close_reason: Sanitized and shortened native AudioLDM CLI prompt text to prevent upstream filename overflow.

title: Cache waveform peaks on disk to eliminate first-visit lag
description: get_waveform_peaks reads the entire WAV every call (~30-100ms per file × N files × StrictMode = seconds of mount lag). Cache computed peaks at <wav>.peaks.<n>.json and reuse when fresh. Add a session-scoped frontend cache so we don't even hit Tauri after the first call in a session.

title: TTS server: auto-swap model on type mismatch
description: _ensure_model in tts_server.py fails fast with 'Wrong model loaded' when the loaded variant differs from the endpoint's required type. The clone-from-design flow needs to swap voice_design -> base automatically. Switch behavior: unload current, load required.

title: CLI: pharaoh script import — parse Fountain into scenes/characters/script.csv
description: Add a CLI command that takes a Fountain file and creates scenes, characters, and per-scene script.csv inside an existing project. Splits on INT./EXT./EST. headings, extracts unique characters from DIALOGUE blocks, compiles blocks to ScriptRows. Should also support --dry-run.

title: Timeline interaction pass: drag-to-place, edge trim, drop from asset browser, vertical drag
description: Headline UX gap. Currently 'Place →' auto-snaps to end of track. Add: drag a script-row card directly onto the timeline at chosen position; drag asset-browser items onto timeline; edge handles to drag-trim placed clips; vertical drag between tracks (changes row.track). Snap to 0.5s grid + zero-crossings.

title: Add loudnorm + alimiter master chain with target-LUFS dropdown
description: Append loudnorm (single-pass at first, expose two-pass as 'final quality' toggle later) and alimiter -1 dBTP to the final filter graph. Add target_lufs parameter to render_scene. Default -16 LUFS. Surface a dropdown in the render header.

title: Storyboard rewrite / Chekhov's Gun continuity pass via LLM
description: Architecture spec calls this out. CLI: pharaoh storyboard rewrite <project>. Re-read all scripts via LLM, find dropped threads / unfired guns / inconsistencies, propose patches. Builds on existing draft_scene infrastructure.

title: Verify and fix sidecar Regenerate path (right-click on asset)
description: Right-click on asset in browser should read .wav.meta.json and pre-fill the matching generation panel. Verify implemented and fix gaps.

title: Phase 4: Timeline drag-to-place clips
description: Make timeline clips draggable horizontally. On drag end, call update_script_row with the new start_ms computed from pixel position / PX_PER_SEC. Snap to 100ms grid. Show drop guides at 0.5s intervals.

title: Audit AudioLDM implementation quality failure
description: Native AudioLDM now completes but outputs articulated noise/static unlike upstream examples. Audit command defaults, checkpoint/model choice, duration handling, prompt processing, and Mac/CPU path before further patching.
close_reason: Switched native AudioLDM default to upstream audioldm-m-full, honored variants, rounded durations, and removed prompt boilerplate.

title: Add minimal toast notification system
description: Build toastStore + ToastHost component, wire job-failed events to surface TTS load errors as toasts.

title: Add headless inference server lifecycle commands
description: The CLI now covers authoring, review, audio inspection, render metadata, and setup hardware, but it still cannot start/stop the Python inference server stack or run the GUI Woosh setup flow headlessly. Add scriptable server lifecycle commands that wrap inference/start_servers.sh or a shared Rust helper and expose clear status/progress for agents.

title: Refactor nav: rail = workspace switcher, sidebar = workspace context
description: Collapse 11-item rail + duplicate sidebar to: rail with 5 workspace modes (Pyramid/Story/Scenes/Polish/App), sidebar contents change per workspace. Voice/SFX/Score become inline tabs within the Scenes workspace, not top-level rail destinations. Remember last-used view per workspace.

title: Make AudioSR upscales visible in job queue
description: Audio Upscale button enters local busy state, but no right-rail job appears and no progress is surfaced while the AudioSR CLI subprocess runs.
close_reason: Added frontend post job visibility and streamed AudioSR CLI progress events.

title: Phase 2: Rust inference commands + job polling
description: commands/inference.rs: submit_tts_job, submit_sfx_job, submit_music_job (each POSTs to server, spawns background tokio poll loop emitting job-progress/job-complete/job-failed Tauri events). check_server_health. Server URL configurable. Wire into lib.rs.

title: Split music server into its own conda env (pharoah-music)
description: ace-step pins transformers==4.50.0 while qwen-tts requires transformers==4.57.3 + accelerate==1.12.0. Cannot coexist in the same env. Move ace-step into a separate conda env 'pharoah-music' and update start_servers.sh to dispatch each server to the right interpreter.

title: Pre-fill clone transcript when saving design take
description: In CharacterDesignerView, the 'Save as character voice' button on a design take switches to the Clone tab but leaves the reference transcript empty. Pre-fill it with the test line that produced the take.

title: Redo dialogue and score generation pages
description: Apply SFX page pattern to dialogue and score: empty inputs, expose backend generation parameters, and show real generated takes/cues for the selected scene.
close_reason: Updated dialogue and score panels with empty inputs, exposed parameters, scene sync, and real generated asset history.

title: Add Table Read playback: queue all DIALOGUE rows back-to-back via TTS
description: Cold-read button on scene view: play every DIALOGUE row in order (regenerating draft rows on demand), no SFX/music/timeline gaps. Audio-drama equivalent of a screenplay table read.

title: Model download button (run hf via shell)
